## Summary

Describe the problem and the resulting behavior.

## Related Issues

Use `Closes #123` only when this pull request fully satisfies the issue's
acceptance criteria. Use `Refs #123` for partial work or a prerequisite. For a
small issue-free change, write `Not required` and give a short reason.

## Verification

List the checks and tests run.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and does not include private data or unrelated files.
- [ ] Issue links accurately identify complete versus partial work.
- [ ] Tests cover behavior changes.
- [ ] User-facing configuration or behavior is documented.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated when the change affects users or operators.
